chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appl. No.459 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on MA. 5657/2024. 2. For hearing of main case 18.10.2024 Ms. Wajiha Aman, Advocate for applicants. Ms. Amna Ansari, APG. = It appears that application filed by applicant u/s 249-A Cr.P.C was dismissed against which she instead of filing Cr. Revision Application has filed Cr. Misc. Application. Law is settled on this point that an order passed by the Magistrate u/s 249-A Cr.P.C is amenable before Sessions Judge in Revision Application. This being the position, I find this Cr. Misc. Application devoid of merits and accordingly dismiss it. However, applicant would be at liberty to file revision application before competent court of law against impugned order. The Cr. Misc. Application is dispose of in the above terms alongwith listed application. J U D G E A.K
